items.title: Cold Comfort Farm
items.description: Stella Gibbons' brilliantly funny portrayal of English rural life in the 1930s, dramatised by Paul Doust and directed by Becki Sherlaw-Johnson.

items.title: The Private Collection
items.description: An original play written by Becki Sherlaw-Johnson and David Lines. Featuring Katie Saville and Ruth Thornburn.

items.title: Plaza Suite
items.description: Neil Simon's classic comedy, featuring Beth Binnian, Mark Saville and Alison Richards.

items.title: Twelfth Night
items.description: Shakespeare's beloved comedy — one of many classic works the Players have performed over the decades.

items.title: Mother Goose
items.description: One of several pantomimes the Players have produced, delighting audiences young and old.

items.title: Original One-Act Play
items.description: A world premiere of a one-act play by Sally Wainwright, performed by the Players.
